scada_hint.zh: 風向標讀數正常，但偏航位置回授與指令偏差 +12°。問題不在感測。
scada_hint.en: Wind vane normal, but yaw position feedback deviates +12° from command. Not the sensor.

root_cause_label.zh: 偏航煞車未完全釋放，齒盤輕微卡滯
root_cause_label.en: Yaw brake not fully released; ring gear slightly stuck

knowledge_tip.zh: 偏航位置回授偏差 ≠ 感測器故障；應優先檢查偏航煞車與齒盤定位。
knowledge_tip.en: Yaw feedback deviation ≠ sensor fault; check the yaw brake and ring-gear alignment first.
